name: XPhone Connect
description: XPhone Connect is a Unified Communications & Collaborations software that unifies telephony, presence, CRM and hotline management in a single solution. Customisable, seamlessly integrated and fully GDPR-compliant.
longDescription: XPhone Connect is a unified communications platform that combines telephony, chat, meetings, and messaging in a single application. It integrates with existing PBX systems and business applications such as CRM and ERP systems. The platform provides features such as computer telephony integration (CTI), softphone functionality, presence management, and a centralized communication history. It supports office, remote, and mobile work scenarios through desktop and mobile clients. XPhone Connect is developed and maintained by a German company and is primarily used by organizations in Europe that require integration with existing telephony systems and compliance with European data protection requirements.The UC software can be deployed on-premises or in hybrid environments, enabling organizations to maintain control over their communication infrastructure and data. Features • Computer Telephony Integration (CTI) • Softphone (desktop and mobile) • Business chat (1:1 and group) • Audio and web meetings • Screen sharing • Presence and availability management • Voicemail, fax, and SMS integration • Central communication history (journal) • CRM and ERP integrations • Mobile apps (iOS and Android)
features: No vendor lock-in via open standards
Supports SIP, WebRTC and REST APIs
